name: CION Investment Corp
summary: Overview CON Investment Corporation, or the Company, was incorporated under the general corporation laws of the State of Maryland on August 9, 2011. When used in this Annual Report on Form 10-K, the terms we, us, our or similar terms refer to the Company and its consolidated subsidiaries. In addition, the term portfolio companies refers to companies in which we have invested, either directly or indirectly through our consolidated subsidiaries. Moreover, the terms: 2031 Notes refers to our 7.50% ...
